title: Secrets
subtitle: Encrypted credentials for endpoint profiles and tasks
rotateConfirm: Rotate this secret? Endpoint profiles that use it will start resolving the new value on the next request. The previous version is no longer returned.
rotateHint: Rotating replaces the stored value. Linked endpoint profiles keep the same secret ID and pick up the new value automatically.
deleteConfirm: Archive this secret? Profiles that reference it will stop resolving the value.
deleteConfirmInUse: Archive this secret? It is used by {count} endpoint profile(s). Those profiles will stop resolving the value.
emptyHint: Create a secret to use with authenticated endpoint profiles.
needsTenant: Select a tenant and environment before managing secrets.
plaintextWarning: This value is shown only once after create or rotate. Store it securely — it will not appear again.

fields.name: Name
fields.valueHint: Stored encrypted. Never returned by the show API after this response.
